# Digital Garden - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
A personal digital garden with Frutiger Aero aesthetic featuring markdown notes with public/private visibility via tags.

## Tech Stack
- Node.js with TypeScript
- Markdown parsing with marked
- Express for development server
- Static site generation

## Key Features
- Frutiger Aero design (glass morphism, gradients, bubbles)
- Markdown note-taking
- Tag-based visibility (public/private)
- Static site generation

## Development Commands
- `npm run dev` - Start development server
- `npm run build` - Build static site
- `npm run new-note` - Create new note

## Note Visibility
- Add `public` tag to make notes visible
- Notes without `public` tag are private by default
